'''''Enhanced Jabba's Palace''''' was a line of cards created for the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]]. The product was created and produced by [[Decipher]] before losing the license to [[Wizards of the Coast]]. The line was made in an effort to get rid of excess [[Jabba's Palace Limited|Jabba's Palace packs]].

EJP (as it is commonly called) was notable for containing a card of [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], the first live-action depiction of that character. Model [[Shannon McRandle|Shannon Baksa]] posed for the image.

==Publisher's summary==
''Can you say Mara Jade? Finally, the fabled character (from the Timothy Zahn novels and 'Tales From Jabba's Palace') comes alive as one of the 12 new Premium cards for this enhanced set.''

''Each of the four Enhanced tuck boxes contains 4 booster packs from the original Jabba's Palace expansion set plus 3 new Premium cards. You'll know exactly which 3 Premium cards you're getting in each EJP tuck box because the die-cut front will reveal the face card (one of the four different face cards).''
